\tzpentry{ID5807}{Kaluza-Klein Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5807 introduces Kaluza-Klein Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \frac{d}{dt}\left[\mathcal{H}_{\text{mag}} + \frac{\lambda_g}{\mu_0}\mathcal{H}_{\text{ac}} + \sum_{m=1}^{\infty}\frac{m}{R_{KK}}\mathcal{H}_m^{KK}\right] = 0 \end{equation}
